query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sector, p.priority, p.projectState, SUBSTRING(p.overview, 1, 100) as overview_snippet FROM projects p WHERE p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS') AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm') AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0) ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.name LIMIT 30
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sector, p.priority, p.projectState, SUBSTRING(p.overview, 1, 100) as overview_snippet FROM projects p WHERE p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS') AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm') AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0) ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.name LIMIT 30
